quality_gate_message: If Python or tooling files change, run uv run python -m oaknational.python_repo_template.devtools check before you stop.

blocked_shell_patterns.reason: git stash is prohibited here because it can lose uncommitted work.
git reset is prohibited here because it can discard commits or changes.
git checkout -- is prohibited here because it discards uncommitted changes.
git clean is prohibited here because it deletes untracked files.
git rebase is prohibited here because it rewrites history.
--no-verify is prohibited here because it bypasses git hooks.
Force push is prohibited here because it overwrites remote history.

blocked_hook_bypass_flags.reason: --no-pre-commit is prohibited here because it bypasses pre-commit hooks.

blocked_hook_bypass_env_vars.name: HUSKY
blocked_hook_bypass_env_vars.reason: HUSKY=0 is prohibited here because it disables git hooks.

blocked_hook_bypass_env_vars.name: SKIP_HOOKS
blocked_hook_bypass_env_vars.reason: SKIP_HOOKS=1 is prohibited here because it disables git hooks.

blocked_git_config_overrides.name: core.hooksPath
blocked_git_config_overrides.reason: core.hooksPath overrides are prohibited here because they bypass repo git hooks.

blocked_hook_bypass_env_var_prefixes.reason: GIT_CONFIG_* is prohibited here because it can hide hook bypasses or force pushes.

blocked_git_config_prefixes.reason: Git alias overrides are prohibited here because they can hide hook bypasses or force pushes.

blocked_pre_commit_skip_reason: SKIP is prohibited here when it bypasses the repo's quality-gates or commitizen-commit-msg hooks.
blocked_dynamic_git_config_reason: Dynamic git config is prohibited here for git commit and git push because it can hide hook bypasses or force pushes.
